feat.failure: As success, but the penalty lasts for 1 minute.
feat.name: Slowing Strike
feat.success: The creature takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds until the beginning of your next turn.
feat.text: You wound your enemy so they can’t move nimbly. The target must attempt a Fortitude save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: Your Strike hits an off-guard creature and deals damage.
